scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix inventory-service && npm install --prefix supplier-service && npm install --prefix procurement-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GW,AUTH,PROD,INV,SUPP,PROC,UI" -c "cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta,red,white" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:supplier" "npm run dev:procurement" "npm run dev:frontend"
